contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that looks up a cached calipso_map_cache_entry by key. On success (return 0), it increments the refcount on entry->lsm_data and stores the pointer in secattr->cache, transferring a live reference to the caller. The caller must eventually release this reference (e.g., via netlbl_secattr_cache_free). On failure (return -ENOENT), no reference is acquired and secattr->cache is left unchanged. The function also performs internal cache maintenance (activity tracking and list reordering) but these do not affect the caller's ownership obligations.

The additional list traversal and activity/reordering logic are internal cache management details necessary for the lookup.
